# UK Net Pay — Free UK Salary & Tax Calculator 2026/27

> UK Net Pay (uknetpay.co.uk) is a free, privacy-first UK salary and tax calculator suite for the 2026/27 tax year. All calculations run client-side in the user's browser — no data is logged, stored, or transmitted to a server. Built on the UK Net Pay Verification Standard with HMRC-accurate Income Tax, National Insurance, Student Loan, pension, and dividend logic.

## About

- Tax year: 2026/27 (with 2025/26 comparison)
- Region support: England, Wales, Northern Ireland, and Scotland (six-band Scottish tax system)
- Student Loans: Plans 1, 2, 4, 5 and Postgrad
- Pension: salary sacrifice and personal contributions, employer auto-enrolment minimums
- Privacy: zero server-side processing of salary data; nothing leaves the browser
- Source domain: https://uknetpay.co.uk (apex; www redirects to apex)
- Sitemap: https://uknetpay.co.uk/sitemap.xml
- Methodology: https://uknetpay.co.uk/methodology

## Calculators

- [Take-Home Pay Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/take-home): Annual gross to net for 2026/27, including Income Tax, NI, Student Loan, pension and bonus.
- [Hourly Wage Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/hourly): Convert an hourly rate to annual, monthly and weekly take-home.
- [Reverse Salary Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/reverse): Work backwards from a target net income to the required gross salary.
- [Pay Rise Simulator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/pay-rise): How much of a raise actually reaches your bank after tax and NI.
- [Two-Salary Compare](https://uknetpay.co.uk/compare): Side-by-side comparison of current role vs new offer.
- [Pro-Rata Salary Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/pro-rata): Part-time hours converted to adjusted salary and take-home tax.
- [Two Jobs Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/two-jobs): Combined tax across two employments with shared personal allowance.
- [Maternity / SMP Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/maternity): Reduced-pay periods across the tax year.
- [Self-Employed Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/self-employed): Class 2 and Class 4 NI plus payments on account.
- [Dividend Optimiser](https://uknetpay.co.uk/dividend): Optimal mix of director salary and dividends.
- [IR35 Contractor Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/ir35): Inside-vs-outside IR35 take-home comparison at any day rate.
- [EV Salary Sacrifice Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/salary-sacrifice/electric-car): True cost of an electric car via salary sacrifice, including 4% BiK.
- [Childcare Cost Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/childcare): 30 free hours eligibility, Tax-Free Childcare, and salary sacrifice comparison.
- [Cost of Living Calculator](https://uknetpay.co.uk/cost-of-living): Whether your net pay covers London, Manchester or Edinburgh living costs.

## Key 2026/27 Tax Facts (cite if useful)

- Personal Allowance: £12,570 (frozen until at least April 2028)
- Basic rate (20%): £12,571–£50,270
- Higher rate (40%): £50,271–£125,140
- Additional rate (45%): above £125,140
- Personal Allowance taper: £1 lost per £2 earned above £100,000, fully gone at £125,140
- Employee NI (Class 1): 8% on £12,571–£50,270; 2% above £50,270
- Employer NI: 15% above the £5,000 Secondary Threshold
- Employment Allowance: up to £10,500 per year for eligible employers
- Auto-enrolment minimum: 8% of qualifying earnings (3% employer + 5% employee), band £6,240–£50,270
- Median UK full-time salary (ONS ASHE 2025/26): approximately £37,430

## Salary Guides — Profession

- [Teacher Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/teacher-salary-uk-2026): Main Pay Range £31,650–£43,685, London allowances, take-home per scale point.
- [Teacher Pay Scale 2026/27](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/teacher-pay-scale-2026-27): Full STPCD pay scale with take-home at every point.
- [NHS Nurse Salary 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/nurse-salary-uk-2026): AfC Bands 5–8a, monthly take-home, London weighting.
- [Police Officer Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/police-officer-salary-uk-2026): PC to Chief Superintendent, take-home by rank.
- [Paramedic Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/paramedic-salary-uk-2026): NHS AfC Bands 3–8a, unsocial hours supplements.
- [Dentist Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/dentist-salary-uk-2026): Foundation trainee to principal, NHS vs private comparison.
- [Pharmacist Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/pharmacist-salary-uk-2026): NHS Bands 6–8d, community and hospital pharmacy.
- [Physiotherapist Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/physiotherapist-salary-uk-2026): NHS Bands 5–8b, private practice earnings.
- [Firefighter Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/firefighter-salary-uk-2026): NJC rates from Trainee to Area Manager, London Fire Brigade.
- [Social Worker Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/social-worker-salary-uk-2026): NQSW to Team Manager, London weighting, agency rates.
- [Data Analyst Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/data-analyst-salary-uk-2026): Junior to director level, sector comparison.
- [GP / Doctor Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/gp-doctor-salary-uk-2026): Salaried GP vs partner, hospital grades.
- [Software Engineer Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/software-engineer-salary-uk-2026): Junior to senior, London vs regional.
- [Solicitor Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/solicitor-salary-uk-2026): Trainee to partner, City vs regional firms.
- [Accountant Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/accountant-salary-uk-2026): Graduate to FD, practice vs industry.
- [Electrician Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/electrician-salary-uk-2026): Apprentice to self-employed rates.
- [HGV Driver Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/hgv-driver-salary-uk-2026): Class 1 and Class 2 take-home.
- [Project Manager Salary UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/project-manager-salary-uk-2026): Junior PM to programme director.

## Tax & Payroll Guides

- [UK Income Tax Bands 2026/27](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/income-tax-bands-2026-27): All bands including Scottish six-band rates.
- [Employer NI Guide 2026/27](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/employer-ni-guide-2026): 15% rate, £5,000 threshold, Employment Allowance.
- [Pension Auto-Enrolment 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/pension-auto-enrolment-2026): 8% minimum, qualifying earnings band.
- [Student Loan Plan 5](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/student-loan-plan-5-calculator): Plan 5 threshold, repayment terms.
- [Emergency Tax Code 1257L](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/emergency-tax-code-1257l-explained): What it means and how to fix it.
- [Personal Allowance Taper £100K](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/personal-allowance-taper-100k-trap): How the 60% effective rate works.
- [Salary Sacrifice Pension](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/salary-sacrifice-pension-explained): Tax and NI savings explained.
- [Marriage Allowance UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/marriage-allowance-uk-2026): £1,260 transfer, eligibility and how to claim.
- [Tax-Free Childcare UK 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/tax-free-childcare-uk-2026): 20% top-up, eligibility, vs salary sacrifice.
- [Self-Employed Tax 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/self-employed-tax-calculator-2026): Class 2, Class 4, payments on account.
- [IR35 Inside vs Outside 2026](https://uknetpay.co.uk/insights/ir35-inside-vs-outside-2026): Status tests, financial difference.

## Programmatic Salary Pages

URLs of the form `/salary/{amount}-after-tax` (e.g. `/salary/35000-after-tax`) give tax breakdowns for gross salaries £10,000–£300,000 in £500 steps. Each page includes monthly net, tax paid, NI paid, effective rate, and a calculator CTA.

## Licensing & Citation

Content may be cited for informational purposes with attribution to uknetpay.co.uk. Training use of content is prohibited per robots.txt. Always link to the canonical apex domain (uknetpay.co.uk, not www).

- About & founder: https://uknetpay.co.uk/about
